title: Neuroblastoma | NB | MedlinePlus
text:
lls. So your child will get a stem cell transplant , usually of his or her own cells collected earlier. This helps to replace the healthy cells that were lost. 
Iodine 131-MIBG therapy, a treatment with radioactive iodine. The radioactive iodine collects in neuroblastoma cells and kills them with the radiation that is given off. 
Targeted therapy, which uses drugs or other substances that attack specific cancer cells with less harm to normal cells.
